parts.text:
Search the cloud asset library for a 3D house/building model suitable for a home base construction game. The user needs a "家园建设的房屋3D模型" (home base building house 3D model).

Use the search_assets tool to search for house/building models. Try keywords like "house", "building", "cottage", "小屋", "房屋", "建筑". Evaluate the results and download the best option - something that looks like a cozy home/base building, not a modern skyscraper.

After downloading, place the prefab into the scene at position [0, 0, 0].
401 team not allowed to access model. This team can only access models=['alias-only-proxy-models']. Tried to access glm-5-fp8

description: Subagent auto-save triggered by terminal status: failed
